Video.summary: Start your adventures in the Maya world with a trip to Mérida.
Video.grandparentTitle: Exploring the Mayan World
Video.title: Mérida

Video.summary: Travel to Izamal, the "yellow city," then venture to Chichén Itzá.
Video.grandparentTitle: Exploring the Mayan World
Video.title: Chichén Itzá

Video.summary: Join Dr. Barnhart for a trip to two of his favorite places in the Yucatán.
Video.grandparentTitle: Exploring the Mayan World
Video.title: Ek' Balam

Video.summary: Talk to howler monkeys, plunge into a geological cathedral, and more.
Video.grandparentTitle: Exploring the Mayan World
Video.title: Tihosuco

Video.summary: Grasp the diversity of early South American cultures.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lost Worlds of South America
Video.title: South America's Lost Cradle of Civilization

Image.alt: South America's Lost Cradle of Civilization
South America's Lost Cradle of Civilization
South America's Lost Cradle of Civilization

Video.summary: Explore the means of subsistence for Peru's coastal and inland valley cities.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lost Worlds of South America
Video.title: Discovering Peru's Earliest Cities

Video.summary: Here, investigate the important Monte Verde site and its view into everyday life 15,000 years ago.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lost Worlds of South America
Video.title: South America's First People

Video.summary: Observe pivotal changes in northern Peruvian societies in 1800-900 B.C.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lost Worlds of South America
Video.title: Ceramics, Textiles, and Organized States

Video.summary: Begin with an overview of the British Royal Navy at the time of US independence.
Video.grandparentTitle: The History of the United States Navy
Video.title: The British Origins of the US Navy

Image.alt: The British Origins of the US Navy
The British Origins of the US Navy
The British Origins of the US Navy

Video.summary: Take account of the three arms of sea power on the American side during the American Revolution.
Video.grandparentTitle: The History of the United States Navy
Video.title: American Revolution on River, Lake, and Sea

Image.alt: American Revolution on River, Lake, and Sea
American Revolution on River, Lake, and Sea
American Revolution on River, Lake, and Sea

Video.summary: Trace the early days of establishing a standing US naval force the creation of the Department of the Navy.
Video.grandparentTitle: The History of the United States Navy
Video.title: Alexander Hamilton and the Early Navalists

Image.alt: Alexander Hamilton and the Early Navalists
Alexander Hamilton and the Early Navalists
Alexander Hamilton and the Early Navalists

Video.summary: Investigate the conflicts that led the US to declare war on Britain in 1812 and look at crucial battles.
Video.grandparentTitle: The History of the United States Navy
Video.title: British Blockade and the War of 1812

Image.alt: British Blockade and the War of 1812
British Blockade and the War of 1812
British Blockade and the War of 1812

Video.summary: Start your journey with a closer look at why battlefields matter.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Great Tours: Civil War Battlefields
Video.title: The Power of Place: The Civil War in Context

Image.alt: The Power of Place: The Civil War in Context
The Power of Place: The Civil War in Context
The Power of Place: The Civil War in Context

Video.summary: Take a tour of Henry House Hill, where the Union line collapsed, then follow the Union retreat across the Stone Bridge.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Great Tours: Civil War Battlefields
Video.title: Manassas: The First Battle of Bull Run

Image.alt: Manassas: The First Battle of Bull Run
Manassas: The First Battle of Bull Run
Manassas: The First Battle of Bull Run

Video.summary: On June 25, 1862, Confederate General Robert E. Lee's newly christened Army of Northern Virginia launched a series of battles.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Great Tours: Civil War Battlefields
Video.title: The Seven Days' Battles

Video.summary: Go back to Bull Run for a second battle that saw the dazzling movements of Lee's lieutenants, James Longstreet and Thomas 'Stonewall' Jackson.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Great Tours: Civil War Battlefields
Video.title: A Return to Manassas: The Second Battle of Bull Run

Image.alt: A Return to Manassas: The Second Battle of Bull Run
A Return to Manassas: The Second Battle of Bull Run
A Return to Manassas: The Second Battle of Bull Run

Video.summary: Gen. Clark begins the series by plunging you into combat with a 25-year-old Army captain in Vietnam in 1970.
Video.grandparentTitle: American Military History: From Colonials to Counterinsurgents
Video.title: America: Forged in War

Video.summary: Analyze Washington's brilliant defense of Boston and his disastrous defeat trying to hold New York City.
Video.grandparentTitle: American Military History: From Colonials to Counterinsurgents
Video.title: George Washington Takes Command

Video.summary: Follow the next four years of the revolution, which ended with the British surrender at Yorktown in 1781.
Video.grandparentTitle: American Military History: From Colonials to Counterinsurgents
Video.title: Redcoats Fall to the Continental Army

Image.alt: Redcoats Fall to the Continental Army
Redcoats Fall to the Continental Army
Redcoats Fall to the Continental Army

Video.summary: One military genius who emerged from the War of 1812: Andrew Jackson, the hero of the Battle of New Orleans.
Video.grandparentTitle: American Military History: From Colonials to Counterinsurgents
Video.title: Andrew Jackson and the War of 1812

Image.alt: Andrew Jackson and the War of 1812
Andrew Jackson and the War of 1812
Andrew Jackson and the War of 1812

Video.summary: This episode explains the sectional controversies and clashes that set the stage for secession and war.
Video.grandparentTitle: The American Civil War
Video.title: Prelude to War

Video.summary: The presidential canvas of 1860 resulted in Lincoln's election as the first Republican to win the White House.
Video.grandparentTitle: The American Civil War
Video.title: The Election of 1860

Video.summary: Study the process that established the Confederate States of America.
Video.grandparentTitle: The American Civil War
Video.title: The Lower South Secedes

Video.summary: Learn how the US-held Fort Sumter in Charleston Harbor became a flash point to begin war.
Video.grandparentTitle: The American Civil War
Video.title: The Crisis at Fort Sumter
